title: endospermum domatiophorum
intro: Endospermum domatiophorum, also known as the Velvet Apple Tree, is a tropical plant native to the rainforests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Endospermum domatiophorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiviral agent. Traditionally, the plant's leaves are used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be prepared by boiling the leaves in water and straining them to create a soothing and potentially medicinal drink.
